projectDescription: A web-based tool that lets developers turn code snippets into stunning, customizable images and share them via shareable links or direct export.
keyFeatures: Live code editor with syntax highlighting for 20+ languages
Highly customizable appearance: themes, backgrounds, fonts, window styles
Export as PNG, JPEG, SVG, or WebP at configurable scale
Shareable snapshot links for viewing and remixing code images
Session history with automatic save and cross-device sync (when signed in)
VS Code and Zed editor extensions for creating snapshots from selections
Transparent background support for flexible use in presentations
publicApiSurface: POST /snapshots — Create a shared snapshot (auth optional)
GET /snapshots/:code — Retrieve a snapshot by short code
GET /history — List history entries for authenticated user
POST /history/sync — Sync local history entries to server
